posts.text: If you think that most people's top priority is 'freedom' then you must have been in a coma all through 2020-2022.

posts.text:
Many are quick to assume someone behaves badly because they have poor mental health, but they seldom consider whether someone has poor mental health because they behave badly.


ZUBY: (@ZubyMusic)

'Mental health' isn't a good excuse to be a bad person.



— https://nitter.net/ZubyMusic/status/2031751834486952434#m

posts.text:
UAE air defences intercepted 12 ballistic missiles and 17 drones launched from Iran on Monday - a sharp drop on previous days.

Since the start of the Iranian attacks on the UAE, 233 ballistic missiles and 1,359 drones have been intercepted and destroyed.
